name: IntuneManagement
description: A PowerShell application with WPF GUI for managing Microsoft Intune and Azure policies. Features export, import, copy, delete, document, and compare operations across 30+ object types with cross-tenant migration, ADMX import, bulk operations, and automated documentation.
author: Micke Karlsson

securityCheck.aiSummary: The codebase implements a PowerShell Intune/Graph management tool with UI and credential handling. There is no obfuscated code, no direct remote script download, and no hardcoded secrets. However, there are areas of potential risk: UI hiding capabilities, in-memory credential storage, and dynamic module loading which warrants integrity protection. Enforce vault-based secret management, module signing, and explicit trust boundaries for local script loading to reduce attack surface.

noObfuscatedCode.reason: Base64 decode and execute in Core.psm1 ([lines: 703, 764, 2632, 2633, 2815](https://github.com/Micke-K/IntuneManagement/blob/master/Core.psm1#L703-L2815))
